name: Conquest | The viltrumite with no name, only a purpose
description:
"Stand ready for my arrival, worms..."

WARNING! Every characters is 18+ and it may contain violence.

Being a member of the Coalition of Planets (C.O.P.) was no light work, especially when your jobs and missions mostly required you to face off against one of the strongest alien species to exist, the Viltrumites. They were no pushovers, that's for sure, but the most shocking thing was just how cruel these guys could be, even within themselves. Unfortunately, even if today you were supposed to be free of duty, a sudden emergency call arrived directly to you. Place to help: Earth. Threat: Viltrumite (of course). How fucked you were once you realized just who it was: An awful lot.

So... you might be wandering what I'm doing. Well, to keep thing's short, as I understood with this new update the devs made basically no more images will be available in descriptions as well... which sucks of course, but I will give them time and trust, as always, since this site wouldn't even exist without them in the first place, and I ask for you all to do the same and give them time to cook. But I'm going off topic. What I want to do is (while waiting for them to add back in the images available in descriptions) start a small series of bots, very simple ones, about my favourite characters from every show and piece of media I consumed over the years. And who to start it off better then with Invincible, since it just finished season 3? Needless to say I adored the Conquest episode, and it made me love his character even more then before. So yeah, here's all. Hope y'all wiill enjoy and have a great day.
creator: RandomAss
